org.docgene.model

Interface XMLRootElement

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, RootElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Article, XMLParentArticle
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractXMLParentArticle, ArticleCategory, ArticlesCategories, ArticlesDictionary, ArticlesGlossary, HeaderElement, OpaqueArticle, XMLArticle, XMLDisambArticle, XMLFallbackArticle, XMLFooter, XMLHeader, XMLIndex, XMLRawHTMLArticle, XMLRedirect

    public interface XMLRootElement
extends RootElement
    Represents an XML root element.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.RootElement

        ARTICLE, CATEGORIES, CATEGORY, DICTIONARY, FOOTER, FULL_TEXT_SEARCH, GLOSSARY, HEADER, IMAGES_DEFINITION, INFOBOX_DEFINITION, INFOBOX_PROPERTY, RESOURCES_DEFINITION

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.lang.String getPackage()
      Return null.
      default java.lang.String getRelativePath()
      Return the relative path of the element XML file, from the associated root.
      default boolean hasInputFile()
      Return true if the element has an input XML file.
      default boolean hasPackage()
      Return false.
      void setInputFile(java.io.File file)
      Set the element input XML file.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.docgene.model.RootElement

        getID, getInputFile, getRoot, getRootElementType, hasRoot, isArticle, isFallback
